title: Education Administrators, Postsecondary
description: Plan, direct, or coordinate student instruction, administration, and services, as well as other research and educational activities, at postsecondary institutions, including universities, colleges, and junior and community colleges.

tasks.text: Design or use assessments to monitor student learning outcomes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recruit, hire, train, and terminate departmental personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct, coordinate, and evaluate the activities of personnel, including support staff engaged in administering academic institutions, departments, or alumni organizations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise students on issues such as course selection, progress toward graduation, and career decisions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan, administer, and control budgets, maintain financial records, and produce financial reports.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Formulate strategic plans for the institution.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Establish operational policies and procedures and make any necessary modifications, based on analysis of operations, demographics, and other research information.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide assistance to faculty and staff in duties such as teaching classes, conducting orientation programs, issuing transcripts, and scheduling events.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Represent institutions at community and campus events, in meetings with other institution personnel, and during accreditation processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare reports on academic or institutional data.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Promote the university by participating in community, state, and national events or meetings, and by developing partnerships with industry and secondary education institutions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in faculty and college committee activities.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Direct activities of administrative departments, such as admissions, registration, and career services.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Appoint individuals to faculty positions, and evaluate their performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop curricula, and recommend curricula revisions and additions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Consult with government regulatory and licensing agencies to ensure the institution's conformance with applicable standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in student recruitment, selection, and admission, making admissions recommendations when required to do so.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine course schedules, and coordinate teaching assignments and room assignments to ensure optimum use of buildings and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Teach courses within their department.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review student misconduct reports requiring disciplinary action, and counsel students regarding such reports.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review registration statistics, and consult with faculty officials to develop registration policies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with other academic staff to explain and formulate admission requirements and course credit policies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct scholarship, fellowship, and loan programs, performing activities such as selecting recipients and distributing aid.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Direct and participate in institutional fundraising activities, and encourage alumni participation in such activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate the production and dissemination of university publications, such as course catalogs and class schedules.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write grants to procure external funding, and supervise grant-funded projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and promote sporting events and social, cultural, and recreational activities.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
